prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BLKGKIT2020-7PC Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 7pc Black Dual Riffle Gold Pan Prospecting Tools Gold Panning Kit Description: Get in on the gold rush. Whether you're a seasoned prospector or just planning to poke around your local riverbed for the first time, the ASR Outdoor 7-Piece Classic Field Gold Panning Kit with Black Dual Riffle Gold Pans is a great starter kit for beginners or as an addition to an experienced gold miner's arsenal of gold prospecting tools and equipment.

Your kit includes:

x2 black dual riffle gold prospecting pans
x2 magnifying tweezers with X4 magnification
x3 glass gold, gem or precious metals storage vials

The stand out component of this classic field gold panning kit are the two black dual riffle gold prospecting pans. With both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for effective material deposit separation and deep black color to highlight even the finest gold flakes in the bottom of your pan, the riffled traps work to catch precious metals as the lighter material flows out of the pan, efficiently increasing your gold recovery efforts.

This ASR Outdoor classic field gold panning kit is compact and lightweight, easily fitting into any backpack or bag with your other gold prospecting equipment and tools; pack it with you for family day trips, camping adventures, beach days, gold prospecting excursions and more. And importantly, all the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from quality material; from the high impact dual riffle plastic gold pans, to the metal magnifying tweezers and durable glass vials, these gold mining tools will see you through many gold panning seasons to come.

Happy prospecting, we hope you strike it rich. Search Terms: gold panning recovery prospecting outdoor kit supplies equipment for beginners mining sluice tools pan geology gem stone collecting Features: - GOLD RUSH READY: Get ready to mine for gold on your next gold panning adventure with the ASR Outdoor 7-Piece Classic Field Gold Panning Kit featuring two black dual riffle pans, two magnifying tweezers with x4 magnification and three glass vials; this starter gold panning kit features basic gold mining components for gold recovery and gold storage and is suitable for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: The stand out component of this classic gold panning kit are the two black dual riffle gold pans; with both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for material deposit separation and deep black color to highlight even fine gold, the riffled traps work to catch precious metals as the lighter material flows out of the pan, effectively and efficiently increasing your gold recovery efforts - COMPACT AND PORTABLE: This ASR Outdoor classic field gold panning kit is compact and lightweight, easily fitting into any backpack or bag with your other gold prospecting equipment and tools; pack it with you for family day trips, camping adventures, beach days, gold prospecting excursions and more - GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from high quality materials that will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come and will stand up to lots of wear and tear - SPECIFICATIONS: Kit includes: two (2) black dual riffle gold pans, two (2) magnifying tweezers, three (3) glass vials; Dimensions: 12 inch gold pan, 3.75 inch tweezers, 2.75 inch glass vials; Weight: .85lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-Pc Black Dual Riffle Gold Pan Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-Piece Black Dual Riffle Gold Panning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dual Riffle Pans, Magnifying Tweezers, Glass Vials, Gold Recovery, Beginner Prospecting
